atDirectives.name: @theme
atDirectives.description: Tailwind CSS v4 theme variables block. Generates utility tokens from CSS custom properties.

atDirectives.name: @source
atDirectives.description: Tailwind CSS v4 source detection directive. Adds files or globs to scan for class names.

atDirectives.name: @utility
atDirectives.description: Tailwind CSS v4 custom utility directive.

atDirectives.name: @variant
atDirectives.description: Tailwind CSS v4 variant directive for applying variants inside CSS.

atDirectives.name: @custom-variant
atDirectives.description: Tailwind CSS v4 directive for defining custom variants.

atDirectives.name: @apply
atDirectives.description: Tailwind CSS directive for inlining utility classes into custom CSS.

atDirectives.name: @reference
atDirectives.description: Tailwind CSS v4 directive for importing theme variables and utilities without emitting CSS.

atDirectives.name: @config
atDirectives.description: Tailwind CSS directive for loading a JavaScript configuration file.

atDirectives.name: @plugin
atDirectives.description: Tailwind CSS directive for loading a plugin.
